title: S3 bucket without lifecycle policy
description: prod-logs stores 9.2TB entirely in S3 Standard with no transition to IA/Glacier.

title: IAM user with stale access keys
description: Access key for ci-deployer is 410 days old and unrotated.

title: Security group open to world on 3306
description: analytics-pg SG allows 0.0.0.0/0 inbound on MySQL/Aurora port.
